name: Rough Notation
when_to_use: 需要让下划线、圈选、框选或高亮跨多行文字并在布局变化后仍贴住目标时用它而非手写,因为原生 SVG 在文本分行几何、reflow 重算和手绘动画上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能给文本加静态 border/background,做不到跨行 getClientRects 几何、手绘双笔触动画与布局变化后的重新贴合;Rough Notation 把这些能力压成一个目标元素加浅配置。

data_in.note: target_selector 必须命中已完成布局的 DOM 元素;annotate 会在目标旁插入 SVG,表格单元格内应先包一层 span 或 div。

schema.target_selector: string —— 唯一目标元素的 CSS selector

config.padding?: number | number[] —— 像素或 CSS 顺序数组,默认 5
config.multiline?: boolean —— 多行内联文本逐行描边,默认 false

carriers.widget: supported:目标位于 shadowRoot 时,生成的绝对定位 SVG 作为同树 sibling 插入;无外置 CSS
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + SVG/DOM 几何,应在字体和目标布局稳定后 show

isolation.evidence: rough-notation@0.5.1 +esm: createElement('style') with textContent '@keyframes rough-notation-dash { to { stroke-dashoffset... }}' appended to document.head (ensureKeyframes, one-time/idempotent). Annotation svg (createElementNS 'svg'/'path') is appended to target.parentElement as an absolutely-positioned sibling (uses .style.position + parentElement) — stays in the target's subtree (inside shadow if the target is), no document.body portal. No document/window event listeners; animation is pure CSS keyframes. Shadow works for the SVG sibling but the head-level @keyframes is unreachable from shadow -> default-animate annotation won't render unless animate:false or keyframes replicated in-shadow.
